reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion de los playeros educados predispuestos y efecientes. Desagradable la atencion del servicompras y cafeteria 20' antes de cerrar no sirve cafe y te corre con el trapo y el secador lavando el piso. 25/01/2020 . ACA para tener en cuenta . Gracias

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach attendants: polite, helpful, and efficient. The service at the convenience store and cafeteria was unpleasant; 20 minutes before closing time they stopped serving coffee and rushed you out with a mop and squeegee while mopping the floor. 01/25/2020. Something to keep in mind. Thank you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzX05INkZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
El motel es muy bueno: espacio de estacionamiento privado, habitaciones cómodas y bien decoradas. Al llegar nos esperaba una atención de agua y caramelos. Muy bien cuidado el predio.

(Translated by Google)
The motel is very good: private parking, comfortable and well-decorated rooms. Upon arrival, we were greeted with water and candy. The grounds are very well maintained.
